fingerprint_string: Exclusively orders 18-8 stainless steel fasteners with plain finish, showing strong preference for corrosion resistance and cleanroom compliance.
notable_patterns: 100% consistency in ordering 18-8 stainless steel with plain finish across all 17 orders
Strong preference for metric threading (M4, M6, M8, M16) over imperial sizes
Frequently reorders identical items (M16 washers, M8 lock washers, M8 flat washers)
Orders washers and fasteners in coordinated sizes, suggesting systematic assembly applications
